name: Tuna and Mushroom Cream Over Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Button mushrooms, cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 can White tuna in spring water, broken into chunks (6 1/2oz)
2 tbsp Fresh Italian parsley, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or skillet, heat the oil with the shallots and garlic over moderate heat.
2. When the vegetables sizzle, raise the heat to high and add the mushrooms. Saute until they begin to brown, 4 to 5 minutes.
3. Reduce the heat and add the evaporated milk. Simmer briskly, stirring frequently to prevent boiling over, until the milk reduces by about a third, reaching a creamy consistency, 5 to 7 minutes.
4. Stir in the parmesan cheese and, as soon as it melts, fold in the tuna and herbs. Simmer until the tuna is heated through.
5. Spoon the sauce over cooked pasta and season with black pepper to taste.
